examples: refrigeration delayed the softening of the fruit
he observed the softening of iron by heat

meanings.definition: make (images or sounds) soft or softer
give in, as to influence or pressure

examples: He moderated his tone when the students burst out in tears
This liquid will soften your laundry
The bread will soften if you pour some liquid on it

meanings.definition: having a softening or soothing effect especially to the skin
